articles.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
articles.description: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). The NSB advises the president and Congress on the National Science Foundation (NSF), which has already been funding research at historically low levels and has seen significant delays in doling out that funding. The NSF has been fundamental in […]

articles.title: An influx of used EVs could drive down prices
articles.description: Part of what has held back electric cars has been the cost. But an influx of used vehicles over the next three years could bring prices down dramatically. In 2025, just 123,000 leases on EVs expired. That is expected to more than double to 300,000 in 2026, and double again to 600,000 in 2027 and […]

articles.title: Researchers say we’re talking less than ever
articles.description: Researchers at the University of Missouri-Kansas City and the University of Arizona say that between 2005 and 2019, the number of words we speak out loud to another human being fell by nearly 28 percent. And that has likely only gotten worse following the pandemic. The researchers actually counted the number of words we were […]

articles.title: Sharge’s fast Qi2.2 MagSafe battery is down to $70 with a free USB-C cable
articles.description: I’ve been testing compact, magnetic Qi2 power banks that can snap onto your phone for an upcoming buying guide. They make recharging much easier than bringing along a huge battery that weighs down your bag. One of my favorites so far is the Sharge Icemag 3, a 10,000mAh model that can wirelessly output 25W to […]

articles.title: The Govee smart lamp brightened up my room, and then my life

articles.title: Xbox’s weirdest studio is on a roll
articles.description: For a while there, it seemed like Double Fine might be struggling under the Microsoft corporate umbrella. The game studio led by Tim Schafer is beloved for offbeat titles like Brütal Legend and Broken Age, but after being acquired by Microsoft in 2019, its only new release for years was a long-awaited sequel to Psychonauts. […]

articles.title: Sho Miyake answers life’s greatest questions
articles.description: Acclaimed Japanese director Sho Miyake has arrived in the States. He's brought with him two feature films: Small, Slow But Steady and Two Seasons, Two Strangers, a pair of naturalistic portraits that deal with the uneasy human desire to relate to other people. Seclusion and unease are bedrocks to Miyake's growing filmography. "I like these […]

tech.summary:
🔬 今日科技动态摘要

1. **政策与科研动荡**：美国总统特朗普解雇了国家科学委员会全体成员，引发对科研独立性和政策连续性的担忧。
2. **电动汽车市场趋势**：大量二手电动汽车涌入市场，可能推动价格下行，降低消费者购车门槛。
3. **社交与通信行为变化**：研究显示，人们面对面交流的频率降至历史最低，引发对社交隔离和心理健康影响的关注。
4. **科技巨头与AI投资**：谷歌计划向人工智能公司Anthropic投资高达400亿美元，显示AI领域竞争持续升温。
5. **医疗与疫苗突破**：欧洲率先批准莫德纳公司联合mRNA流感和新冠疫苗，标志着疫苗技术向多病种联合方向迈进。

**今日最值得关注的趋势**：人工智能领域的巨额投资与科研政策的不确定性形成鲜明对比，而电动汽车价格下行和疫苗技术革新则预示着消费与健康领域的积极变化。

ai.summary:
🔬 今日AI动态摘要

1. **DeepSeek-V4重磅发布**：具备百万级token超长上下文能力，华为云首发适配，PPIO等平台已上线预览版，标志着大模型在长文本处理与Agent应用上取得关键突破。
2. **华为加速智能驾驶与全屋智能布局**：发布ADS 5强化世界模型路线，今年投入180亿；同时与奥迪合作推动燃油SUV智能化，涂鸦智能推出AI宠物健康监测，展现多场景AI落地。
3. **国产AI图像生成能力再升级**：有模型挑战GPT-Image-2，国产AI生图“天花板”被捅破，显示国内在视觉生成领域持续追赶。
4. **自动驾驶赛道进入“物理AI”阶段**：轻舟智航率先进军物理AI，优必选发布人形机器人开发者平台Thinker cosmos，推动机器人从实验室走向规模化应用。
5. **学术界与政策动向**：GCC成立AI/LLM政策工作组；0博士组合（两位本科生+非传统背景研究者）获ICLR时间检验奖，凸显AI领域对创新与跨背景人才的开放。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：DeepSeek-V4的百万级上下文能力与华为ADS 5的发布，分别在大模型与智能驾驶两个关键领域标志着AI技术从“可用”向“可规模化实用”迈出实质一步。

articles.description: China and Russia kicked off their second joint computer-assisted anti-missile drill on Monday, a move experts said could deter potential missile threats amid rising tensions on the Korean Peninsula.

articles.title: Memorial Day a time to 'remember', 'inspire'

articles.title: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
articles.description: China will strengthen innovation by developing high-tech industries with military technologies to boost military-civil integration, a move that aims to cultivate new growth drivers and boost the economy, said a recent State Council guideline.

articles.title: Dangerous stunts get thumbs-down from video platforms
articles.description: Multiple social media and video streaming platforms will limit who can view videos that depict dangerous stunts - and may even prohibit such material - in an effort to discourage imitators.

articles.title: Taiwan's New Party vows to help improve relations

articles.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former Party chief of Chongqing, is being investigated on allegations of bribery, State prosecutors said on Monday.

articles.title: Top procuratorate investigates Sun Zhengcai
articles.description: The Supreme People's Procuratorate (SPP) of China announced on Monday that it has started investigation into Sun Zhengcai, former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

articles.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
articles.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

articles.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
articles.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

articles.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
articles.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
articles.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
articles.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

articles.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
articles.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

articles.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
articles.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.

cctv.summary:
🔬 今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中俄联合反导演习**：北京与莫斯科举行潜在导弹战争背景下的联合军事演练，凸显两国在防务领域的战略协作深化。
2. **军民融合与绿色转型**：更多军事技术被定向转向民用领域以提振经济；同时，国际组织赞扬中国的绿色复兴努力，北京煤改气项目获亚投行2.5亿美元贷款支持。
3. **民生与治理焦点**：教育、医疗费用成为关键社会关切；重庆前政治官员涉腐被调查；南京大屠杀最年长幸存者逝世（享年100岁），引发历史记忆与纪念日反思。
4. **两岸关系与外交**：台湾新党承诺助力改善两岸关系；习近平倡导“习近平式外交”推动中国走近世界，并强调“铲除不良工作作风”。
5. **区域发展与国际合作**：中国为阿拉伯国家发射首颗卫星；南水北调工程改善环境并创造就业；云南香格里拉高原地区旅游与文化价值被专题报道。

今日最值得关注的发展：中俄联合反导演习与亚投行支持北京绿色能源转型，共同体现了中国在安全与气候领域的双重战略布局。
